overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit district at night. The player ascends a concrete stairway through a traditional Japanese torii gate into an elevated foggy plaza lined with holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

events.description: turning right toward the stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk past neon club signs and metal railings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow neon-lit commercial street at night, passing the Bliss club with its prominent white neon signage. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the colorful lights from surrounding storefronts including a green neon sign for Licks. Metal railings line the path as the camera turns toward a distant stairway entrance.

emerging from covered stairs into open foggy atmosphere

wide concrete staircase with metal handrails ascending between buildings

segments.scene_description: Ascending a covered concrete stairway flanked by graffiti-covered walls, approaching a traditional red Japanese torii gate illuminated by pink neon strips. The enclosed space creates a tunnel-like effect before opening up to the foggy night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open plaza with fog and holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting stairway into open elevated plaza with visible sky
turning left to follow main thoroughfare

entered.detail: rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights and holograms
towering skyscrapers covered in large digital advertisements and anime characters
traditional Japanese-style street lantern with digital display panels
futuristic hovering car silhouetted against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a wide open plaza with foggy atmosphere and full sky visibility. The wet pavement mirrors the glow of massive holographic billboards on distant towers. A flying vehicle hovers overhead as the camera turns left along the elevated thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial thoroughfare with elevated transit and digital signage

events.description: crowd density increases near commercial buildings and transit station

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the main commercial thoroughfare with moderate pedestrian traffic. A massive vertical billboard dominates the left side while an elevated transit structure runs parallel to the walkway. Neon-lit palm trees and reflective wet pavement create a vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance with angular neon architecture and coffee shop

segments.scene_description: Approaching a distinctive hotel entrance characterized by angular red architecture with diagonal cyan neon strips. The blue neon HOTEL sign glows above the entrance where pedestrians gather. A digital advertising pillar stands on the sidewalk as the camera moves toward the sheltered entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, neon-drenched commercial street into a sprawling, elevated futuristic plaza. It begins by moving along a wet concrete sidewalk past the white neon signage of the Bliss club and green lights of Licks, before turning toward a distant stairway. As the camera ascends the graffiti-covered concrete stairs, the space narrows into a tunnel-like passage that leads through a red torii gate illuminated by pink neon strips. The scene then opens up into a wide, foggy plaza where the wet pavement mirrors massive holographic billboards and a flying vehicle hovers overhead. Finally, the camera proceeds along a vibrant thoroughfare lined with neon palm trees and an elevated transit structure, moving toward a hotel entrance defined by angular red architecture and glowing cyan neon strips.
